name: @mediadatafusion/pi-workflow-suite
description_en: Multi-agent workflow suite for Pi with Idle, Standard, Plan, Mission, approval gates, reviewer/validator roles, sub-agents, model routing, web search/fetch, browser checks, diagrams, compaction, presets, settings, themes, widgets, and Repo Lock.
description_zh: Pi 的多代理工作流套件，具有空闲、标准、计划、任务模式、审批门、审查者/验证者角色、子代理、模型路由、网络搜索/获取、浏览器检查、图表、压缩、预设、设置、主题、小部件和仓库锁定功能。
